title: fagara tetrasperma
intro: Fagara tetrasperma, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara tetrasperma include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Fagara tetrasperma can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
